name: Unit String
helpText: Unit displayed after the value (e.g. / kWh, per unit).

name: Decimal Places
helpText: Number of decimal places for data values.

name: Warning Threshold (%)
helpText: Margin percentage below which the status shows 'Marginal' instead of 'Profitable'. Default 10%.

name: Tooltip Content (Override)
helpText: Override the auto-generated context-aware tooltip. Leave empty for dynamic tooltip that adapts to data.

name: Custom Accent Color
helpText: Override theme accent color, e.g. #FF6B35. Leave empty for default cyan.
